name: Communications Inbox Review
description: A bounded inbox review with selected messages summarized, classified, and turned into explicit follow-up only when authorized.
audience: Operations and support teams reviewing shared inboxes
problem: A busy mailbox mixes routine messages, sensitive content, and work requests that need different treatment.
outcome: A bounded inbox review with selected messages summarized, classified, and turned into explicit follow-up only when authorized.
operatorPath: Choose the mailbox, time window, and review rules.
Define which messages may create work, be marked, or receive a response.
Review the shortlist and approve any external follow-up.
agentPath: Fetch only the bounded message set and preserve mailbox privacy rules.
Summarize and classify with uncertainty visible.
Prepare or create approved follow-up work and leave unrelated messages untouched.
recovery: If mailbox access or UID state is stale, stop and refresh instead of guessing message identity.
If classification is uncertain, leave the message unchanged and flag it for review.
safeStoppingPoints: Stop with a read-only shortlist when message mutation or response was not authorized.
prerequisites: A bounded mailbox and time or UID scope
Rules for privacy, marking, replies, and work creation
proof: Mutation or follow-up receipts only where approved
whenToUse: A project needs an agent to inspect recent email messages and decide which ones need action.
The agent should reuse existing communication-message resources and prior request history before fetching more.

stages.title: Orient From Mailbox History
stages.summary: Read prior messages, requests, and the current goal.

stages.title: Search Bounded Messages
stages.summary: Search the configured mailbox by explicit criteria and limit.

stages.title: Fetch Selected Messages
stages.summary: Fetch only selected fields/body previews for candidate UIDs.

stages.title: Create Or Prepare Work
stages.summary: Create or prepare generic agent requests only for messages that need follow-up.

stages.title: Update Mailbox Status
stages.summary: Mark reviewed messages seen only when approval and policy allow it.
